package repository

import "context"

// VersionsRepository is a draft repository boundary for versions.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type VersionsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query VersionsQuery) ([]Version, error)
}

type VersionsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
